name: Hamato Guardian Stance
oracle_text: Target creature gets +1/+3 and gains flying until end of turn. Scry 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put that card on the bottom.)

name: Harmonized Crescendo
oracle_text:
Convoke (Your creatures can help cast this spell. Each creature you tap while casting this spell pays for {1} or one mana of that creature's color.)
Choose a creature type. Draw a card for each permanent you control of that type.

name: Harsh Annotation
oracle_text: Destroy target creature. Its controller creates a 1/1 white and black Inkling creature token with flying.

name: Haste Magic
oracle_text: Target creature gets +3/+1 and gains haste until end of turn. Exile the top card of your library. You may play it until your next end step.

name: Hazel's Nocturne
oracle_text: Return up to two target creature cards from your graveyard to your hand. Each opponent loses 2 life and you gain 2 life.

name: Heartless Act
oracle_text:
Choose one —
• Destroy target creature with no counters on it.
• Remove up to three counters from target creature.

name: Heated Argument
oracle_text: Heated Argument deals 6 damage to target creature. You may exile a card from your graveyard. If you do, Heated Argument also deals 2 damage to that creature's controller.

name: Heritage Reclamation
oracle_text:
Choose one —
• Destroy target artifact.
• Destroy target enchantment.
• Exile up to one target card from a graveyard. Draw a card.

name: Hide on the Ceiling
oracle_text: Exile X target artifacts and/or creatures. Return the exiled cards to the battlefield under their owners' control at the beginning of the next end step.

name: Hidetsugu's Second Rite
oracle_text: If target player has exactly 10 life, Hidetsugu's Second Rite deals 10 damage to that player.

name: High Stride
oracle_text: Target creature gets +1/+3 and gains reach until end of turn. Untap it.

name: Homesickness
oracle_text: Target player draws two cards. Tap up to two target creatures. Put a stun counter on each of them. (If a permanent with a stun counter would become untapped, remove one from it instead.)

name: Horrid Vigor
oracle_text: Target creature gains deathtouch and indestructible until end of turn.

name: How to Start a Riot
oracle_text:
Target creature gains menace until end of turn. (It can't be blocked except by two or more creatures.)
Creatures target player controls get +2/+0 until end of turn.

name: Huatli's Final Strike
oracle_text: Target creature you control gets +1/+0 until end of turn. It deals damage equal to its power to target creature an opponent controls.

name: Hurl into History
oracle_text: Counter target artifact or creature spell. Discover X, where X is that spell's mana value. (Exile cards from the top of your library until you exile a nonland card with that mana value or less. Cast it without paying its mana cost or put it into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom in a random order.)
